questions: How do I become a journalist?
What are the types of journalism?
answers: Journalism is the practice of gathering, verifying, and reporting news and information to the public through various media channels.
Journalism holo news ar information collect kore, verify kore, ar public er kache pouche deya — newspaper, TV, ba online er maddhhomey.
To become a journalist, study mass communication or journalism, build a portfolio of articles, develop strong writing and research skills, and learn to meet tight deadlines.
Major types include investigative journalism, broadcast journalism, photojournalism, sports journalism, and digital journalism — each with its own style and audience.
